title: Contact | PoliceStationRepUK — Find Accredited Police Station Reps

headings.text: Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: HomeContact UsGet in TouchHave questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.How we handle enquiriesWe usually respond to email within 24 hours and SMS messages sooner. Please provide a clear subject line and any relevant context to help us route your message quickly.Send Us a MessageNameEmailSubjectMessageLeave blankSecurity CheckType these words: "velvet marker"Send EmailDirect ContactEmail (Preferred)robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukSMS (Urgent matters only)07535 494446Important NoticePoliceStationRepUK is operated by Defence Legal Services Ltd — an independent directory service.We are NOT affiliated with:The Law Society, Solicitors Regulation Authority (SRA), London Criminal Courts Solicitors Association (LCCSA), Criminal Law Solicitors Association (CLSA), The Legal Ombudsman, any UK police force, Border Force, UK Visas and Immigration, or any other government body.We cannot provide:Legal advice, access to case management systems, intervention in legal matters, or handle complaints about solicitors or representatives. We are solely a directory connecting firms with freelance representatives.For complaints about representatives or firms:Please contact the representative or their employing firm directly. Legal service complaints should be directed to the Legal Ombudsman.⚠️ We do not respond to enquiries regarding these matters as we have no information or authority to assist. Please contact the appropriate organisation directly.Find RepresentativesBrowse our directory of accredited repsView DirectoryRegister as RepCreate your free profile todayGet StartedBecome FeaturedFree during testingLearn More
